devnotes.summary: Get the next multiple of a given multiplicator which is higher than the number given. Example: Num = 21, Multiplicator = 5, Result is 25
Get the next multiple of a given multiplicator which is higher than the number given. Example: Num = 21, Multiplicator = 5, Result is 25
Get the next multiple of a given multiplicator which is higher than the number given. Example: Num = 21, Multiplicator = 5, Result is 25
Get the next multiple of a given multiplicator which is higher than the number given. Example: Num = 21, Multiplicator = 5, Result is 25
Get the next multiple of a given multiplicator which is lower than the number given. Example: Num = 24, Multiplicator = 5, Result is 20
Get the next multiple of a given multiplicator which is lower than the number given. Example: Num = 24, Multiplicator = 5, Result is 20
Get the next multiple of a given multiplicator which is lower than the number given. Example: Num = 24, Multiplicator = 5, Result is 20
Get the next multiple of a given multiplicator which is lower than the number given. Example: Num = 24, Multiplicator = 5, Result is 20
